blocks.text: Åberg leads The Players — and Arsenal can smell the title
Arsenal, seven points clear at the summit, host Everton at 18:30 — win and the title race is as good as over. Chelsea face Newcastle still stinging from PSG's 5-2 CL demolition on Wednesday.

blocks.label: ⚽ PL top-4 race — today
items: Chelsea vs Newcastle United — 18:30, Champions League spots on the line
West Ham United vs Manchester City — 21:00, City six points adrift of Arsenal

blocks.label: ⚽ La Liga title race
items: Real Madrid vs Elche — 21:00, Bernabéu must-win in the championship battle

blocks.text: 🚴 Mon 12:40 — Tirreno-Adriatico opens: Leknessund & Wærenskjold carry Norwegian hopes
